_comment: Stills re-pulled from the ProRes masters. Each key lists the widths that ACTUALLY exist for that still (we never upscale, so a 2K master only offers up to 2048). Any still NOT listed here renders as a plain from its original file, so this is always safe to extend one film at a time. On-screen layout size is identical for every still regardless of the widths available -- the browser just gets more or less density to work with.
